option.name: originalContent
option.value:
for the prettiest soul i know ✨

Hi Love

I made this just for you...

A little note from my heart

Reasons Why I Love You

Your smile makes my day brighter ☀️
You make everything feel better
You understand my silence and my laughter
Your kindness is the softest magic in my life ✨
You turn ordinary moments into beautiful memories
Your hugs feel like home to my heart
You inspire me to be a better person every day
Loving you feels like the sweetest forever

Days since I fell in love with you ️

0 days of loving you

And I would choose you in every lifetime.

Tiny Dangerous Corner

I love you more than anything in this world

Made with love by Janus, the pixelated lover

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
for the prettiest soul i know ✨

Hi Love

I made this just for you...

I love you more than words can explain

✨

A little note from my heart

✨

Reasons Why I Love You

Your smile makes my day brighter ☀️
You make everything feel better
You understand my silence and my laughter
Your kindness is the softest magic in my life ✨
You turn ordinary moments into beautiful memories
Your hugs feel like home to my heart
You inspire me to be a better person every day
Loving you feels like the sweetest forever
✨

Days since I fell in love with you ️

0 days of loving you

And I would choose you in every lifetime.

✨

Tiny Dangerous Corner

I love you more than anything in this world
